calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-24-2024 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Dylan Hackett, Esq. on behalf of Defendant/ Appellant Kristen Guhde
Kristen Guhde, Defendant/ Appellant is present.
Ilona Yanez, Johanne Goldstein and Jesus Yanez, HOA members on behalf of Plaintiff/ Respondent 157-159-161-163 Capp Street HOA are also present

This case comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Ilona Yanez testifies on behalf of Plaintiff/ Respondent 157-159-161-163 Capp Street HOA.
The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Plaintiff's Exhibit #1 - Declaration of Covenants, Conditions and Restrictions and
Condominium Plan
Plaintiff's Exhibit #2 - Chase Bank Statements for August 2023-March 2024

Mr. Hackett testifies on behalf of Defendant/ Appellant Kristen Guhde.
The following documentary evidence is introduced:
One white binder with exhibits

Defendant's Exhibit #2 - Meeting Notes/E-mails from Kristen Guhde Dated April 6, 2024
Defendant's Exhibit #5 - Declaration of Covenants, Conditions and Restrictions and
Condominium Plan
Defendant's Exhibit #4 - Photocopy of Chase Online Bill Payment Address

Ms. Yanez makes additional comments.
Mr. Hackett makes additional comments.
Both parties present additional remarks.

Ms. Yanez plays a telephonic recording.
The parties submit the matter.

In the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss, Clerk: R. Gumpal, Not Reported, (305).

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Sep-18-2024 Set For Trial On Sep-18-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 305

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-17-2024 Continued To Sep-18-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-05-2024 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
